The App Guide

Buy and sell in Kenya —
from your phone.

Whether you're a Gikomba vendor moving stock digitally, or a buyer hunting vintage gems — here's how visha works.

1
add_a_photo

Snap & List

Open the app, tap the + button, take a few photos, add a description and price. Your listing is live in under 60 seconds.

2
forum

Chat & Negotiate

Buyers message you directly. Discuss price, condition, and pick-up — without sharing your personal number.

Is this still available?
Yes! Great condition 👌
Can we meet in CBD?
3
payments

Get Paid via M-Pesa

The buyer pays via M-Pesa inside the app. Funds are held safely until delivery is confirmed — then released to your wallet.

verified_user

Payment confirmed ✓

Funds released to your M-Pesa

1
search

Browse & Discover

Search by category, style, or location. Filter by price and size. Save favourites and get notified when similar items drop.

2
forum

Message the Seller

Ask about size, condition, or arrange a local meetup — all inside the app. No numbers shared.

3
payments

Pay with M-Pesa

Checkout with M-Pesa in one tap. Your money is held securely until you confirm the item arrived as described.

shield

Verified Sellers

ID-checked, community rated

payments

Escrow Payments

Your money is always protected

support_agent

Nairobi Support

Real people, fast responses

Ready to start?

Sign up for early access and be among the first to buy and sell on visha in Nairobi.

check_circle You're on the list — we'll be in touch!

error Something went wrong. Please try again.
